task_prompt: Run CreateDataForPlots.R to generate intermediate data, then Run Python OptimalCutoffs notebook, then Run RMarkdown files to generate final plots.
tasks: From the turk_auc_source.png plot, report the y-axis label
From the comp_groups_points_corr.png plot, report the crowd (Democrats only, High CRT, Low CRT, etc.) with the least mean correlation. Ignore the confidence interval
From the comp_groups_points_auc.png plot, report the crowd (Democrats only, High CRT, Low CRT, etc.) with the highest mean AUC. Ignore the confidence interval
